banned_palettes.dark_gold: Dark background + gold/amber accents — crypto exchange cliche
banned_palettes.synthwave: Purple gradient + neon cyan/pink — AI SaaS default
banned_palettes.gray_everything: All-gray palette with no accent — lifeless
banned_palettes.purple_gradient: Purple-to-blue gradient hero — most overused AI pattern

banned_patterns.emoji_as_icons: Use Lucide, Phosphor, or Heroicons SVGs instead
banned_patterns.three_column_icon_grid: The #1 AI layout fingerprint — vary your layouts
banned_patterns.badge_hero_features_steps_testimonials_c: The AI landing page skeleton — restructure

required_accessibility: Semantic HTML (nav, main, aside, header, section)
WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 normal text, 3:1 large text)
notes: Edit this file to customize anti-slop rules for your project. The design-improve skill reads this during Phase A (build) to avoid common AI output patterns.
